title: Fix randomizer calling delete on node with backlink

features.name: local_rand_member_in_constraint
features.description: Code should include a class with a local rand member of user-defined type that is referenced in a constraint expression, causing cross-reference backlinks in the AST during randomization.
features.snippet: class reg_R extends uvm_pkg::uvm_reg; rand int value; local rand uvm_pkg::uvm_reg_field _dummy; constraint _dummy_is_reg {_dummy.value == value;} endclass

features.name: virtual_function_rand_mode_call
features.description: Code should include a virtual function that calls rand_mode() method on a rand variable of user-defined type, triggering backlink issues during AST node deletion in randomization pass.
features.snippet: virtual class uvm_sequencer_param_base #(type REQ = int, type RSP = int); virtual function void send_request(uvm_sequence_item t); REQ param_t; if (0 == param_t.randomize()) begin end endfunction endclass

features.name: rand_field_typed_as_uvm_object
features.description: Code should include a class extending uvm_sequence_item with a rand field typed as uvm_object base class, used in a context that triggers randomization backlink issues.
features.snippet: class uvm_reg_item extends uvm_sequence_item; rand uvm_object extension; endclass

features.name: extern_virtual_function_rand_mode
features.description: Code should include an extern virtual function that calls rand_mode() on a rand member, with implementation outside class body, triggering AST backlink issues during randomization.
features.snippet: class uvm_reg_field extends uvm_object; rand int value; extern virtual function bit get_rand_mode(); endclass function bit uvm_reg_field::get_rand_mode(); return bit'(value.rand_mode()); endfunction

features.name: constraint_cross_reference_different_rand_types
features.description: Code should include a constraint that cross-references a local rand member with a regular rand member using dot notation, creating AST backlinks that are not properly cleaned before node deletion.
